title: festuca rubra subsp. cryophila
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. cryophila, also known as Arctic red fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a hardy, low-growing perennial that is commonly found in high-altitude and arctic regions. The medicinal properties of Festuca rubra subsp. cryophila include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function.
